mapper.sql: select id, user_id, rating, services, suggestion, create_time, update_time from community_survey
mapper.select: SELECT survey_id, user_id, rating, suggestion, create_time, update_time, remark FROM community_survey WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR #{userId} IS NULL) AND (rating = #{rating} OR #{rating} IS NULL) AND (suggestion LIKE CONCAT('%', #{suggestion}, '%') OR #{suggestion} IS NULL OR #{suggestion} = '')
mapper.insert: insert into community_survey ( user_id, rating, services, suggestion, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{rating}, #{services}, #{suggestion}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_survey SET user_id = COALESCE(#{userId}, user_id), rating = COALESCE(#{rating}, rating), services = COALESCE(#{services}, services), suggestion = COALESCE(#{suggestion}, suggestion), update_time = COALESCE(#{updateTime}, update_time) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_survey where id in
#{id}
